<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Python ML project for deforestation detection using Sentinel-2 imagery with automated downloading, NDVI calculation, and change detection pipeline

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created comprehensive project structure with all modules, configuration, and documentation

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented complete deforestation detection system with:
  • Automated Sentinel-2 imagery downloading from Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem
  • Google Earth Engine integration support  
  • NDVI calculation and vegetation health analysis
  • Change detection algorithms for deforestation monitoring
  • Automated scheduling system (checks every 5 days)
  • Comprehensive error handling and retry mechanisms
  • Modular architecture with reusable components
  • Integration examples and documentation

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No specific extensions required for this Python project

- [x] Compile the Project - Successfully installed all dependencies and verified system functionality:
  • Python 3.13.7 environment configured
  • All required packages installed (numpy, pandas, matplotlib, scikit-learn, rasterio, geopandas, etc.)
  • Project structure verified and all modules loading correctly
  • Basic NDVI calculation and change detection algorithms tested
  • Configuration system working properly
